vocab.meaning: sự sáng tạo không bị kìm hãm/tự do tự tại
vocab.example: To be an artist is to possess unbridled creativity, allowing one to transform mundane objects into extraordinary masterpieces.

vocab.meaning: người kể chuyện bằng hình ảnh
vocab.example: I find the idea of being a visual storyteller incredibly appealing, as it transcends language barriers through imagery.

vocab.meaning: sự lành nghề/tay nghề tỉ mỉ
vocab.example: Beyond inspiration, being a sculptor requires meticulous craftsmanship and hours of grueling physical labor.

vocab.meaning: khả năng cảm thụ nghệ thuật
vocab.example: Developing profound artistic sensibilities would enable me to appreciate the subtle nuances of color and light in everyday life.

vocab.meaning: khơi gợi một phản ứng từ tận bản năng/sâu thẳm
vocab.example: The most rewarding aspect of being an artist would be the ability to evoke a visceral reaction from the audience.

vocab.meaning: một sự theo đuổi/công việc đơn độc
vocab.example: While painting is often a solitary pursuit, it provides a rare opportunity for deep introspection and self-discovery.

vocab.meaning: kích thích tư duy/gợi suy nghĩ
vocab.example: I believe the true purpose of an artist is to provoke thought and challenge the status quo through their work.

vocab.meaning: sức hút về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: While technical skill is vital, an artist must also consider the aesthetic appeal of their creations to engage the public.

vocab.meaning: một bảng màu rực rỡ/sống động
vocab.example: If I were a painter, I would utilize a vibrant color palette to convey a sense of optimism and energy.

vocab.meaning: đạt được trạng thái cực kỳ tập trung/thăng hoa
vocab.example: Artists often attain a state of flow where they become so immersed in their creation that they lose all track of time.
